title: Learn Node.js Basics
content: Review core Node.js concepts such as modules, file system operations, and asynchronous code.

title: Practice CLI Arguments
content: Create a simple command-line tool that reads commands and arguments from process.argv.

title: Understand Promises
content: Practice using async and await with promise-based file system methods.

title: Build Notes App
content: Implement list, create, update, and delete operations for a small notes application.

title: Refactor Repository Logic
content: Move file reading and writing logic into a separate notes repository module.
